calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Calving Housiu Lin and Yun Bao Liang; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Yun Bao Liang (mother) sworn and examined. Petitioner Calvin Housiu Lin sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Bonnie Ling.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Anson Lin to Jacky Shixian LiAnson wen Zhou Wu.
The court also grants the Petition for name change of father Calvin Housiou Lin to Calvin Housiu Wu.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
